title: Bed Bug Treatment in New Rochelle, NY | $1,200 – $3,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bed bug treatment in New Rochelle, Westchester. Fast, effective extermination for homes and apartments. Prices from $1,200 – $3,500. Call today for a free inspection!
intro: Dealing with bed bugs in New Rochelle? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive bed bug treatment services throughout New Rochelle and Westchester County. Our experienced technicians use proven heat treatment and chemical methods to eliminate bed bug infestations in homes, apartments, and multi-family buildings.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving New Rochelle residents, we understand the unique challenges of bed bug control in Westchester's diverse housing stock. Our licensed technicians provide same-day emergency service, thorough inspections, and guaranteed results with follow-up treatments included in every service package.
localContext: New Rochelle's mix of historic homes near the waterfront, high-rise buildings along Huguenot Street, and garden apartments throughout the city all face bed bug challenges. From co-ops downtown to single-family homes in Wykagyl and Premium Point, we've successfully treated properties throughout every New Rochelle neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in New Rochelle typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of infestation, and treatment method. We offer free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees. Most apartments and small homes fall in the $1,200-$1,800 range, while larger homes or severe infestations may require more extensive treatment.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments take 4-8 hours depending on your property size and chosen method. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require 2-3 visits spaced two weeks apart. We'll provide a detailed timeline during your free inspection and work around your schedule to minimize disruption.

faqs.question: Do you service all neighborhoods in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide bed bug treatment throughout all New Rochelle neighborhoods including downtown, North Avenue corridor, Wykagyl, Premium Point, Davenport Neck, Sutton Manor, and the waterfront areas. We're familiar with the various housing types in New Rochelle and can effectively treat everything from pre-war co-ops to modern condominiums.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and EPA-approved chemical treatments for bed bugs in New Rochelle. Heat treatment eliminates bed bugs in one day by raising room temperatures to lethal levels, while chemical treatments use safe, targeted pesticides applied over multiple visits. Our technicians will recommend the best method based on your specific situation, budget, and timeline.
